title: Scientists Just Tested the First AI-Designed Vaccine on Humans
script: Scientists have hit a new milestone: an AI-designed coronavirus vaccine just passed its first human trial. The vaccine was engineered entirely by artificial intelligence using genetic data from every known Sarbeco coronavirus — SARS, COVID-19, and related bat viruses. It was tested on 39 volunteers, found to be safe, and triggered immune responses against multiple strains. It's the first vaccine ever built by AI to reach humans. Phase 2 is next.
